name: instapaper
description: Local Instapaper access for saved articles, folders, highlights, and bookmark actions.

interface.longDescription: Local Instapaper utilities for listing saved articles, reading metadata, fetching highlights, saving URLs, and archiving items with encrypted systemd credential storage.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Instapaper saved articles when I ask for read-later triage, article digests, or saved-link management.
